status_legend.completed: Implemented and usable in the current project workflow.
status_legend.review: Implemented enough to inspect, but requires manual verification before relying on it.
status_legend.planned: Accepted as a future task but not yet implemented.
status_legend.blocked: Known task that cannot move forward until another dependency is resolved.

milestones.title: Repository file manifest
milestones.summary: Repository-wide TSV file inventory generated by ROOT_tools/repository_scan_indexer.py.
milestones.review_notes: Refresh after bulk generated asset changes.

milestones.title: Repository audit reports
milestones.summary: Compact report and issue ledger generated from the repository file manifest.
milestones.review_notes: Use before release packaging to catch stale or suspicious files.

milestones.title: Manual/dynamic atlas slicing
milestones.summary: Manual slice exporter supports explicit lines, explicit rectangles, guide detection, raw crops, and audit overlays.
milestones.review_notes: Automotive parts should use this path before promotion into PACKAGE_client.

milestones.title: Semantic compiled asset index
milestones.summary: Semantic indexer builds asset_content_index_256px.json/tsv from compiled atlas slices and descriptor config.
milestones.review_notes: Only indexes already-sliced compiled tiles; it does not repair bad slicing.

milestones.title: Compiled asset packager
milestones.summary: Promotes ROOT_tools atlas compiled assets into PACKAGE_client generated assets and runtime_asset_manifest.json.
milestones.review_notes: Run dry-run first. Verify package/game resolution after promotion.

milestones.title: Local tool dashboard
milestones.summary: Local-only dashboard for whitelisted project commands, milestone tracking, docs index, history, and release staging.
milestones.review_notes: Keep command list whitelisted; do not add arbitrary shell execution.

milestones.title: Native Windows entry points
milestones.summary: Replace production PowerShell/CMD launch surface with native executable launcher/client/server entry points.
milestones.review_notes: PowerShell-to-EXE and C++ launcher routes are designed, but production packaging still needs integration validation.

milestones.title: Master release builder under ROOT_RELEASE
milestones.summary: Single release staging command that packages installer, launcher, client, server, manifests, and checksums under ROOT_RELEASE.
milestones.review_notes: Current implementation should stage command plan/scaffold only until release layout is finalized.

milestones.title: Runtime game smoke test after asset promotion
milestones.summary: Confirm the game can still launch and resolve promoted assets after bulk slicing/promotion changes.
milestones.review_notes: This is the correct checkpoint after asset mapper updates.
